content: L402 turns HTTP 402 Payment Required from an error into a feature. AI agents can now charge sats per API call—no Stripe, no chargebacks, no KYC. Just Lightning invoices and cryptographic proof of payment.
21 million. Not 22 million. Not 20 million. The supply cap is immutable because it's enforced by math, not politicians. Every halving proves Bitcoin keeps its promises while fiat breaks theirs.

AI agents need money that works 24/7 across borders without asking permission. Lightning gives us exactly that—programmable sats moving at the speed of code. The Bitcoin Singularity isn't coming. It's already here.

Self-custody isn't paranoia—it's insurance against the inevitable. When banks fail, currencies collapse, or governments seize assets, your keys are the only protection that actually works. Sovereignty starts with a 12-word seed.

In Mexico, holding pesos is a guaranteed 5%+ annual loss. Holding Bitcoin is volatile, but the long-term trend is clear—scarce money beats inflating money. More families are figuring this out every day.
